title: Device Settings - List of supported settings vs UI headset spec
scenario: Verify that headset settings displayed in the Poly Studio Mobile app match the headset UI specification for supported features
steps: 1. Acquire the UI specification document for the tested Poly headset.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
3. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to navigate to Device Settings.
4. Review the list of settings displayed under Device Settings (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications).
5. Compare each setting listed in the app against the headset UI specification document.
6. Verify that all supported headset settings from the spec are present in the app.
expected: All supported headset settings from the UI specification are present in the Poly Studio Mobile app under Device Settings.
